name: @infinite-snowball/root
description: Private monorepo root for the Infinite Snowball web game and declarative content ecosystem.

scripts.lockfile: node tools/quality/run-audited-pnpm.mjs install --frozen-lockfile && vitest run tests/meta/workspace-contract.test.ts --testNamePattern "dependency snapshot and lifecycle policy"
scripts.test:content-policy-contract: vitest run tests/meta/workspace-contract.test.ts --testNamePattern "privacy and ignore contract|dependency snapshot and lifecycle policy"
scripts.test:license-provenance-contract: vitest run tests/meta/workspace-contract.test.ts --testNamePattern "pins every approved dependency|fails closed on dependency lifecycle"

reviewedAllowBuilds.rationale: gltfjsx@6.5.3 resolves sharp for local GLTF authoring and image processing; this exact prebuilt native binary version is present in pnpm-lock.yaml.
@gltf-transform/cli@4.4.1 resolves sharp for local asset image processing; this exact prebuilt native binary version is present in pnpm-lock.yaml.
